vibe: Cute, tender, soft pastel, artisan, feminine, handcrafted. Warm and welcoming.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tight text-textMain
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-light tracking-tight text-textMain

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous, breathable, irregular. Use large padding (p-12 to p-24) to create a gallery-like feeling. Avoid harsh straight lines.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-3xl or rounded-[40px] for soft, friendly shapes. Use fully rounded (pill) buttons.
layout_and_spacing.grids: Bento grids with asymmetrical spanning, masonry layouts for the gallery to highlight the handcrafted nature.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primaryForeground hover:bg-primary/90 transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-4 text-lg shadow-sm hover:shadow-md font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-sm text-textMain hover:bg-white/90 transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-4 text-lg border border-border

cards.style: bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/40 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(212,163,150,0.08)] rounded-[32px] p-8 md:p-10

inputs.style: w-full bg-white/50 border border-border/50 rounded-2xl px-6 py-4 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/30 focus:border-primary/50 text-textMain placeholder:text-textMuted/50 outline-none transition-all
inputs.label: block text-sm font-medium text-textMain mb-2 ml-2

sections_instructions.header: Sticky nav with a crystal glassmorphism effect (bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl). Logo text 'marmar_arte' in Cormorant Garamond. Navigation links to Home, About, Services, Gallery, Reviews, Contacts.
sections_instructions.hero: Asymmetrical layout. Soft abstract pastel texture in the background. Large rounded image of the artist. Headline: 'Картины, которые согревают сердце' (Paintings that warm the heart). Include primary CTA 'Заказать картину' (Order a painting) and Instagram link button. Add a handwritten text accent 'С любовью, marmar_arte'.
sections_instructions.about: Two-column organic block. Left: Text about the artist, process, and love for acrylic painting. Right: Image of the artist painting. Use small SVG brush strokes or organic shapes floating around the container.
sections_instructions.services_pricing: Clear breakdown of collaboration stages: 1. Обсуждение и скетч (Discussion & sketch), 2. Материалы (Materials), 3. Работа художника (Artist's work). Pricing section showcasing sizes (e.g., 50x50 cm) with prices in PLN and EUR (e.g., 900 PLN / ~210 EUR). Distinguish painting categories: Пейзажи (Landscapes), Мифические сюжеты (Mythical), Портреты (Portraits), Флористика (Florals). Use soft glassmorphic cards for the pricing tiers.
sections_instructions.gallery: Masonry or asymmetrical grid layout. Include a simple category filter. Images must have rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl corners. Hover states should slightly scale the image and show a soft overlay with the painting title.
sections_instructions.reviews: Soft, welcoming carousel. Review cards should have a slightly different pastel background (e.g., surfaceAccent or secondary at very low opacity). Include quotes from happy customers.
sections_instructions.contact: Contact form section with a powder pink/beige container. Fields: Имя (Name), Email/Телефон (Email/Phone), Ваши пожелания (Your wishes - textarea). Primary submit button. Include direct Instagram link prominently.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Smooth scrolling via Lenis for a premium feel.
motion_and_interactions.entrances: Framer Motion: fade in and slide up slightly (y: 20, opacity: 0, duration: 0.8). Stagger children for lists and grids.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Interactive elements scale slightly (scale-105) with soft easing (ease: [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1]).

images.description: Artist painting in a bright studio. Use as main hero visual.
Woman with dark hair painting, great for 'About Me' section.
Abstract pastel flowing shapes. Use as a low-opacity background texture in hero or contact sections to add warmth.
Multicolored pastel abstract painting for gallery placeholder.
Pastel floral painting for gallery placeholder.
Vibrant acrylic portrait for gallery placeholder.
Landscape acrylic painting for gallery placeholder.

technical_rules.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='contact-submit-button').
technical_rules.components: Use custom HTML/Tailwind for layout and sections to maintain the creative pastel theme. Only use shadcn/ui for complex interactive logic if necessary (e.g., select dropdowns, modals), heavily customizing them to remove the default tech look.
technical_rules.file_format: JavaScript (.jsx / .js) instead of TypeScript where applicable, per prompt constraints.
